mnemonics: CRD: Completely Randomized Design - Control the Randomness!
CRD: Cram the Data into Ranks!
keyPoints: Randomization: Ensures that each treatment is applied to every replicate independently.
Replication: Provides reliable estimates of treatment effects.
Independence: Treatments are applied to replicates independently.
Homogeneity: Assumes constant variance across treatments.
Sphericity: Assumes equal variance across all possible pairs of treatments.
Normality: Assumes normal distribution of residuals.
Equal Variances: Assumes equal variance across treatments.
Assumes randomization, homogeneity, sphericity, normality, and equal variances.
